testsuite.name: s2s.email

testcase.name: purchaseApi
testcase.system-out: User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page select merchant name :- SuhasM select merchant name :- USD select merchant name :- VISA Fetching details for Limit and Charges Details fetched successfully Routing applied → PSP: unicornpayment, RouteTo: unicornpayment Amount Inputs → Min: 100.0, Max: 900.0, Provided: 569.0 ✅ Amount within valid range. Using exact value: 569.0 Generated First Name: div6b8 Purchase created successfully with ID: 69a68161bd77a9764021cc18 Redirected URL: https://staging.paysecure.net/getResponse.jsp?issucces=false Payment failed but expected to pass

testsuite.system-out: User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page select merchant name :- SuhasM select merchant name :- USD select merchant name :- VISA Fetching details for Limit and Charges Details fetched successfully Routing applied → PSP: unicornpayment, RouteTo: unicornpayment Amount Inputs → Min: 100.0, Max: 900.0, Provided: 569.0 ✅ Amount within valid range. Using exact value: 569.0 Generated First Name: div6b8 Purchase created successfully with ID: 69a68161bd77a9764021cc18 Redirected URL: https://staging.paysecure.net/getResponse.jsp?issucces=false Payment failed but expected to pass
